description: One CLAUDE.md file that makes Claude Code build production-grade UI. 1,400+ components from 21st.dev, distinctive typography, Framer Motion, Next.js 15 patterns.

A Spotify clone built with React and Tailwind CSS. Features a sleek, responsive UI inspired by Spotify, showcasing dynamic components, responsive design, and custom styling. Perfect for learning and demonstrating frontend development skills. 🎧✨

A repository for revising frontend development concepts, including responsive design, state management, component-based architecture, and modern UI frameworks. Perfect for honing skills or exploring new tools in frontend development.
React-based Netflix clone demonstrating responsive UI, component architecture, and frontend development skills.
A curated collection of beautiful UI patterns and components. Includes AI agent skills for better frontend development.

Explore essential frontend plugins, libraries, and frameworks. Learn about Next.js, React, state management, UI components, CSS frameworks, animations, and more. Elevate your development skills with curated resources and tools.
Skill- React, html, CSS ,JSX, and UI/UX
Just practicing UI skills from front end mentor

Skill Bridge UI is the frontend application of the Skill Bridge platform, built using Angular 17 and styled with SCSS for clean, modular, and maintainable UI design.  The application follows proper Angular architecture, including components, services, interfaces, and modules, ensuring scalability and clean separation of concerns.

A collection of professional frontend projects built during my Skilledity Internship, including a complete school website UI designed with HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript. Features optimized layouts, animated navigation bars, and responsive components, improving UI performance and usability by 40%.

Claude Code & Antigravity skill: Art Director + Senior Frontend Engineer that autonomously builds complete websites from a single phrase. Next.js, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, shadcn/ui. 8 visual directions, 60+ component catalog, WCAG accessibility.

A collection of 100 mini web projects using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Each project is designed to improve frontend skills and cover a variety of concepts, from simple UI components to interactive features. Perfect for beginners and intermediate developers looking to practice and learn! 🚀
A personal project featuring responsive UI components, created over time to sharpen frontend development skills. Focused on usability, accessibility, and responsiveness.
Building websites, UI's, and components to practice frontend skills.

A daily collection of Angular components, services, forms, routing demos, API integrations, and UI patterns. Built to practice and improve frontend development skills with clean architecture, reusable components, and TypeScript best practices. Ideal for strengthening UI skills and demonstrating consistent learning.

A responsive portfolio clone built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to showcase modern UI design and frontend development skills. Demonstrates layout structuring, styling techniques, and interactive web components.
Responsive multi-page frontend for Insight Skill Development using Angular routing, TypeScript, and interactive UI components.
Apply JetBrains Ring UI visual style to your frontend project by overriding UI component library default theme colors.
Stats preview card component is a coding challenge from frontend mentors to improv on ones ui development skills
A collection of React components inspired by MUI, built to sharpen and showcase frontend development skills.
“Frontend dashboard project showcasing React skills, responsive design, and modern UI components.”
AccessiMind Codex agent skills for generating accessible UI components and frontend patterns aligned with WCAG conformance.
Just Me building random UI components and pages to improve my App frontend skills.
HTML/CSS/Designs of various UI components and pages from https://www.frontendmentor.io demonstrating and refine UI design skills.
This small UI based challenge was from Frontend Mentor. Frontend Mentor provides developers with various challenging tasks to test their skills in front-end technologies like HTML, CSS & JavaScript
This is a simple shoes ecommerce website built with React to demonstrate my frontend skills, including components, routing, state management, and clean UI.
A modern frontend e-learning platform with responsive UI, course browsing, and progress tracking. Built to explore clean design, reusable components, and interactive user experience.
Practice front-end projects and UI components built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as part of ongoing skill development.

A solution to the Fylo data storage component challenge on Frontend Mentor. This project focuses on building a responsive, accessible UI component using modern CSS techniques (Flexbox/Grid) to practice layout skills and custom styling.
A daily frontend practice series where I build modern UI components using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to improve layout, responsiveness, and UI development skills.
